welcome: 🚀 WARP Config Generator ━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━ Generate Cloudflare WARP VPN configs in multiple formats with one tap. 📋 Supported formats: 🔐 WireGuard 🛡️ AmneziaWG ⚔️ Clash / Clash Meta 🪟 WireSock (Windows) Use the menu below to get started ⬇️
help:
❓ Help & Guides ━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━ 📖 How to add a custom DNS server Open configs/dns_servers.json and add: 
{
  "name": "My DNS",
  "servers": ["10.0.0.1", "10.0.0.2"]
}
📖 How to add a relay endpoint Open configs/relay_servers.json and add: 
{
  "name": "Custom Relay",
  "endpoint": "203.0.113.1:51820"
}
📖 How to add a split-tunnel service Open configs/routing_services.json and add: 
{
  "name": "My Service",
  "routes": ["203.0.113.0/24"]
}
🔄 Restart the bot after editing config files. 🛠️ Commands: /start — show welcome & menu /cancel — cancel current generation
warp_status: 📊 WARP Status Check the current Cloudflare WARP service status: 👉 @cfwarpstatus
step_format: ⚙️ Step 1/5 — Choose config format: Select the output format for your VPN configuration.
step_dns: 🔩 Step 2/5 — Select DNS server: 🌐 DNS servers marked [C] — community (may help bypass blocks).
step_relay: 🔄 Step 3/5 — Select endpoint: Default — standard Cloudflare endpoint. Country servers may help bypass regional blocks.
step_routing: 🔗 Step 4/5 — Select routing mode: All traffic — all traffic through VPN. Specific sites — only selected services.
step_services: 🔗 Select services to route through WARP: (tap to toggle, then press Done)
step_confirm: 📋 Confirm config generation ━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━ 📦 Format: {format} 🌐 DNS: {dns} 🔄 Endpoint: {relay} 🔗 Routing: {routing} Press ✅ Confirm to generate the config.
generation_failed: ❌ Failed to register with Cloudflare WARP. Please try again later.
amnezia_deeplink: 🔗 AmneziaVPN Deep Link Open the file and copy the vpn:// link into AmneziaVPN.
web_subtitle: Create a Cloudflare WARP config in a few clicks
web_hint_dns: Alternative DNS servers may help bypass blocks in your region
web_hint_relay: Alternative endpoints may improve connection speed
web_hint_routing: Full tunnel routes all traffic through VPN. Split routes only selected services
web_error_warp: WARP registration failed. Cloudflare API may be blocked in your region. Try running on a VPS or cloud server.
